resources.string: Lets you control this device with a physical mouse or trackball. OpenMouse draws a large cross-hair cursor and clicks for you when the pointer rests still (dwell click), so no buttons are required. Built for people with tremors or limited fine motor control.
Control your device with a mouse, no touchscreen needed.
OpenMouse is ON. Move your mouse to drive the cross-hair cursor; hold it still or click to act. Use the menu on the right edge for double-tap, hold, and navigation.
OpenMouse is OFF. Enable the accessibility service to start.

1. Plug in a USB or Bluetooth mouse.\n2. Tap the button below and turn on \"OpenMouse cursor\" under Installed services.\n3. A big cross-hair follows the mouse. Stop moving and it clicks automatically.
